role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Phragmites) and wetland management.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road width, paving materials, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and regional patterns.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Netherlands. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing strong visual evidence (flat terrain, reeds, brick paving) that supported the correct conclusion. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the specific Dutch infrastructure cues over the more generic German/Danish candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and reeds match image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of reeds and grass verges is accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of brick paving and road width are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Architectural descriptions (dark tiles, brick) are accurate.
